title: Patch's Extra Eevees [Cobblemon]
description: Adds 10 new Eeveelutions to Cobblemon for the remaining types.
body:
# Welcome to Patch's Extra Eevees!

This is a mod for Cobblemon that adds in 10 Eeveelutions so there is an Eeveelution for all types.  There are also edits to the Eevee species file to allow for these evolutions.

### This project is both a data pack and a resource pack, and needs to be loaded into both locations!

# Features
- 10 extra evolutions for Eevee, that can either be evolved or found naturally in the world
- Movepools include support for egg moves, TMs, and move tutors
- Animations for idle, faint, sleeping, blinking, walking, and swimming/flying (if applicable)
- Normal and Shiny textures
- Cry sounds when they are sent out
- Pokedex functionality; the Eeveelutions should show up as entries 9990 to 9999 under their own regional dex entry.
- To make thematic use of all the available Evolution Stones, Umbreon and Espeon have been modified starting with version 2.0 to evolve with Moon Stones and Sun Stones respectively.  If you'd prefer that Umbreon and Espeon retain their original evolution method, please download the NoEVO version.
- Minimap icons (If you use Xaeros Minimap).  Note that if you also use E19 - Cobblemon Minimap Icons, this resource pack needs to be ABOVE E19 in order for the icons to show up properly.

# Mod Dependencies, Conflicts, and Integrations

- Requires whatever you need to run Cobblemon, as well as the Cobblemon mod itself
- It should work with mods that add breeding, TMs, and move tutors
- These Eeveelutions use Pokedex entries 9990 to 9999.  Mods that use these entries too may cause conflicts.
- The mod was made and tested for the following versions. Use in other versions/setups at your own risk:
  - 1.0 - Cobblemon 1.5.2 Fabric and Minecraft 1.20.1
  - 2.0 - Cobblemon 1.6.1 Fabric and Minecraft 1.21.1
  - 3.0 - Cobblemon 1.7.1 Fabric and Minecraft 1.21.1.

# Feedback

This is my first attempt at Minecraft modding.  If you find any bugs or issues with the mod, please leave feedback in the corresponding support thread of the Cobblemon Discord.

# Meet the Eeveelutions!

### -----Antenneon (Bug)-----

**Pokedex**
```
Antenneon was first documented by an insect scientist studying the Bug type.
An Eevee he was watching for a friend had been morphed by the silvery Venomoth
scales that got stuck in its thick fur.
```

**Stats**
```
HP: 110
Attack: 65
Defence: 60
Special Attack: 95
Special Defence: 130
Speed: 65

Ability: Shield Dust
Hidden Ability: Intimidate
```

**Spawn Location/Evolution Method**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


- Spawn Locations: Jungle/Forest Biomes (night only, ultra rare)
- Evolution Method: Trade Evolution (While holding Honey Bottle or Honeycomb)

</details>

### -----Battaleon (Fighting)-----

**Pokedex**
```
Legend has it the first Battaleon was an Eevee that practiced its Double Kick constantly,
doing 100 kicks a day until it awakened its fighting spirit.  Battaleon seek out places
of conflict to train.
```

**Stats**
```
HP: 65
Attack: 130
Defence: 95
Special Attack: 65
Special Defence: 60
Speed: 110

Ability: Vital Spirit
Hidden Ability: Defiant
```

**Spawn Location/Evolution Method**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Spawn Locations: Highlands Biomes (ultra rare), Illager Structures (rare)
- Evolution Method: Move Evolution (Use Double Kick 50 times) --- _NOTE: Until they are integrated into Cobblemon, Eevee's Learnset has been modified to learn Double Kick naturally to accomodate this evolution without needing Egg Move or Move Tutor access._

</details>

### -----Bouldeon (Rock)-----

**Pokedex**
```
Crystal growths on its tail and head are used for defense.  Eevee that venture deep
underground are sometimes changed by the latent energies of buried evolution stones,
their skin becoming hard as diamond.
```

**Stats**
```
HP: 110
Attack: 95
Defence: 130
Special Attack: 65
Special Defence: 60
Speed: 65

Ability: Solid Rock
Hidden Ability: Rough Skin
```

**Spawn Location/Evolution Method**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


- Spawn Locations: Cave and Deep Dark biomes (ultra rare, or rare if near gemstones)
- Evolution Method: Shiny Stone

</details>

### -----Duneon (Ground)-----

**Pokedex**
```
Eevee who live in dry, desert environments will Dig into the ground during
the day to avoid the heat.  The sand escaping their thick fur makes them seem
like a walking sandstorm, which they eventually evolve into.
```

**Stats**
```
HP: 130
Attack: 110
Defence: 95
Special Attack: 65
Special Defence: 60
Speed: 65

Ability: Levitate
Hidden Ability: Sand Spit
```

**Spawn Location/Evolution Method**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


- Spawn Locations: Desert, Savanna, and Sandy biomes (ultra rare, or rare at night)
- Evolution Method: Move Evolution (Use Dig 25 times) --- _NOTE: Until they are integrated into Cobblemon, Eevee's Learnset has been modified to learn Dig naturally to accomodate this evolution without needing TM or Move Tutor access._

</details>

### -----Kamileon (Normal)-----

**Pokedex**
```
Some Eevee who reach maturity without evolving lose the ability to evolve
as their unstable DNA settles.  They can still temporarily shift their type.
Rarely found in urban environments where there is little adapation.
```

**Stats**
```
HP: 130
Attack: 65
Defence: 60
Special Attack: 95
Special Defence: 65
Speed: 110

Ability: Color Change
Hidden Ability: Protean
```

**Spawn Location/Evolution Method**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


- Spawn Locations: Urban biomes (ultra rare)
- Evolution Method: Level 30

</details>

### -----Magneon (Steel)-----

**Pokedex**
```
Eevee that live near deposits of metal can develop magnetic fields of their own,
attracting metal particles from their surroundings.  Magneon then roll around in
lava to form the metal into armored skin.
```

**Stats**
```
HP: 95
Attack: 65
Defence: 130
Special Attack: 65
Special Defence: 110
Speed: 60

Ability: Oblivious
Hidden Ability: Analytic
```

**Spawn Location/Evolution Method**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


- Spawn Locations: Volcanic biomes (ultra rare, or rare near lava), Cave and Deep Dark biomes near lava (rare)
- Evolution Method: Trade Evolution (While holding Metal Coat)

</details>

### -----Mytheon (Dragon)-----

**Pokedex**
```
Prolonged exposure to mystical scales and intense emotion has been documented
to unlock frightening power in some Eevee.  Mytheon tend to make lairs in
isolated locations far from humans.
```

**Stats**
```
HP: 65
Attack: 130
Defence: 65
Special Attack: 110
Special Defence: 60
Speed: 95

Ability: Multiscale
Hidden Ability: Rivalry
```

**Spawn Location/Evolution Method**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


- Spawn Locations: Island biomes (ultra rare)
- Evolution Method: Friendship Evolution (While holding Dragon Scale)

</details>

### -----Pineon (Flying)-----

**Pokedex**
```
Pineon cannot truly fly, but instead leap off of peaks and glide to their
destination, using their ears and tail to expertly ride the wind. The tribe
that first discovered Pineon befriended them and trained them as messengers.
```

**Stats**
```
HP: 65
Attack: 110
Defence: 95
Special Attack: 65
Special Defence: 60
Speed: 130

Ability: Limber
Hidden Ability: Cloud Nine
```

**Spawn Location/Evolution Method**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


- Spawn Locations: Peak biomes (ultra rare) and Sky Island biomes (rare)
- Evolution Method: Dawn Stone**

</details>

### -----Pompeon (Ghost)-----

**Pokedex**
```
When saturated by the spiritual energy of Dusk Stones, Eevee is known to
evolve into a new form.  They are drawn to spooky locations, their bodies a
glowing beacon in the night for wayward spirits.
```

**Stats**
```
HP: 95
Attack: 60
Defence: 65
Special Attack: 110
Special Defence: 65
Speed: 130

Ability: Cursed Body
Hidden Ability: Unnerve
```

**Spawn Location/Evolution Method**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


- Spawn Locations: Spooky biomes (ultra rare, night only)
- Evolution Method: Dusk Stone at night**

</details>

### -----Quilleon (Poison)-----

**Pokedex**
```
Known to extract toxins from the mushrooms they eat, Quilleon will
sometimes be found around alchemists.  Wild Quilleon are often aggressive,
so trainers are advised to ensure they have a strong bond before evolving.
```

**Stats**
```
HP: 65
Attack: 95
Defence: 110
Special Attack: 130
Special Defence: 60
Speed: 65

Ability: Toxic Debris
Hidden Ability: Anger Point
```

**Spawn Location/Evolution Method**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


- Spawn Locations: Swamp and Mushroom biomes (ultra rare) and Swamp Huts (rare)
- Evolution Method: Friendship Evolution (While holding a Red/Brown Mushroom or Crimson/Warped Fungus)

</details>
